sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n83842" key="plhsi/alos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πλησί-ᾰλος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n83842.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">near the sea,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1866.tlg001:29J" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Posidon.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">29J.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
